narrativeAtSnapshot: Aave V1 launched January 2020, introduced flash loans in February — a groundbreaking primitive. TVL at $1.5B and growing steadily post-DeFi summer. The AAVE token migration (from LEND) completed July 2020 at 100:1 ratio. Governance now active with safety module staking live. Weekly mention growth: ~2x in DeFi-native communities. V2 development underway with collateral swap, gas optimizations, and credit delegation features. No mainstream financial press coverage — exclusively DeFi-native audience. Structural signal: 3 elite developers active, $1.5B TVL with real fee revenue, cross-protocol integrations with Uniswap and Curve. Safety module provides protocol backstop — institutional-grade risk management.
